action.reasoning: Observation: Best test=0.6036. Weak on bobcat(0.21), squirrel(0.15), empty(0.23). Analysis: Need to boost rare class performance. Decision: Train improved MLP on extracted features with oversampling + focal loss, and try prediction calibration to adjust for test distribution skew. Also try a new approach: fine-tune only last few layers of DINOv2 with strong augmentation and domain-aware training.
